allow: Bash(node -e "const j = JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('output/graphical-abstract.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('rules_checked:', j._metadata.lint.rules_checked\); console.log\('errors:', j._metadata.lint.errors.length\); console.log\('warnings:', j._metadata.lint.warnings.length\); console.log\('interpreter_notes:'\); for \(const n of j._metadata.interpreter_notes\) console.log\(' -', n.slice\(0, 120\)\);")
Bash(TEST_CASE=A node bin/studio-agent.mjs compile --source knowledge-base.md --out output)
Bash(TEST_CASE=B node bin/studio-agent.mjs compile --source knowledge-base.md --out output)
Bash(TEST_CASE=C node bin/studio-agent.mjs compile --source knowledge-base.md --out output)
Bash(node bin/studio-agent.mjs compile --source knowledge-base.md --out output --render html)
